name: MoneyGram
description_short: Minneapolis MoneyGram at 1855 E Lake St provides check-cashing and money transfer services with extended hours.
description_long:
Located at 1855 E Lake St in Minneapolis, MN, this standalone MoneyGram center specializes in check-cashing and money transfers. The location operates extended hours seven days a week—Monday through Saturday from 8:00 AM to 8:30 PM, and Sunday from 8:30 AM to 8:30 PM—making it accessible for Minneapolis residents with varying schedules. The straightforward check-cashing setup and efficient service make it a practical stop for quick financial transactions.

This Minneapolis location handles check-cashing and money transfer services for customers throughout the Minneapolis area. Call 612-276-9552 to confirm current rates, ask about transfer limits, or learn about specific services available on the day of your visit. The staff can provide details on accepted forms of ID, required documentation, and typical processing times.

When visiting this E Lake St MoneyGram in Minneapolis, bring a valid government-issued ID and your check or transfer information. If you're in the Minneapolis area and need same-day check cashing or money transfers without a bank appointment, this location offers convenient walk-in service. Standard verification procedures apply—calling ahead ensures you have all required documents.
pros: 25+ locations across Minneapolis providing convenient geographic coverage
Available at established retailers like Cub Foods with extended hours (some open until 9 PM)
Offers both online and offline money transfer management options
Partner locations include culturally-focused businesses serving specific communities
Can send and receive money domestically and internationally from single locations
No need to visit dedicated branches—integrated into neighborhood shopping destinations
cons: No fee information disclosed on website; customers must contact locations directly for pricing
Service availability and quality dependent on individual agent location standards and staffing
Limited service details provided online—requires phone calls to specific locations for transaction specifics
Agent-based model means hours and services vary by location rather than standardized offerings
Website provides location finder only; does not clarify which services available at each specific agent
best_for: Customers needing to send or receive international money transfers to Latin America
People seeking convenient in-person money transfer services in their neighborhood
Customers who prefer cash-based transfers and want to combine errands with money services
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for consumers needing accessible domestic and international money transfers through neighborhood retail locations, particularly those with ties to Latin American countries. The main caveat is that specific fees, exchange rates, and service details vary by individual agent location, requiring direct contact rather than transparent online pricing.
services: Transfers at specialty money transfer agent shops
meta_description: MoneyGram at 1855 E Lake St, Minneapolis, MN. Quick check-cashing and money transfers with extended hours.
